extra.reason: Replaced git_revwalk with git_odb_foreach in hanami_push_to_blossom to enumerate all object types (commits, trees, blobs, tags). Extracted callback to file-scope static function for C11 compliance.
Fixed by deferring cap update until after successful realloc. Now cap only changes when the allocation succeeds.
Removed contradictory CURLOPT_UPLOAD and CURLOPT_INFILESIZE_LARGE. Now uses only CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST=PUT + CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS.

Fixed 4 memory leaks: (1) ODB backend freed when git_repository_odb fails. (2) RefDB backend freed when git_refdb attach fails. (3) nostr_ctx freed when refdb creation fails. (4) Error* freed in ensure_relays on relay connection failure. (5) event->id freed before overwrite in sign_event.

Fixed: (1) Detached HEAD now published as raw OID hex. (2) malloc failures in publish_state now skip the ref (continue) instead of sending NULL target. Remaining: cache refresh and network error silencing tracked separately.

Implemented GnostrThreadPrefetch service with refcounted lifecycle, debounced batch dispatch, nostrdb-first lookup, serialized relay queries, and proper owner-context source attachment. Wired into main window startup/dispose and on_multi_sub_event hook.
Implemented full-width card layout via middle-clamp CSS activation and prepend-aware scroll stabilization
Implemented per docs/plans/nip-29-gnostr-plugin-2026-05-18.md; scoped NIP-29 build/test passed; broader ctest had unrelated failures reported.

Implemented raw relay plugin API and plugin lifecycle seams per docs/plans/nip-29-gnostr-plugin-2026-05-18.md; targeted diff/syntax checks passed; full configure blocked by unrelated local pkg-config paths.
Implemented plugin scaffold/service per docs/plans/nip-29-gnostr-plugin-2026-05-18.md; focused syntax checks passed; full configure blocked by unrelated stale pkg-config paths.
Implemented GTK group/message models, groups panel, and chat view per docs/plans/nip-29-gnostr-plugin-2026-05-18.md; service stale-snapshot gap fixed before closing.

Implemented timeline binder policy gating in apps/gnostr/src/ui/gnostr-timeline-view-app-factory.c: pre-hides newly bound rows, evaluates GnostrCardVisibilityPolicy for final visibility, reconnects notify::profile based on actual profile absence, and recomputes visibility after profile arrival while preserving row lifecycle disconnects. Validation: cmake --build _build --target gnostr passed.
Implemented scoped Bucket E changes; focused build passed, validation notes recorded for GUI test environment aborts.
Implemented main-window follow snapshot ownership and refresh for shared card visibility policy; focused gnostr build passes; full CTest has unrelated existing/environment failures noted.
Verified final integration gate: build passed; focused behavioral code inspection complete; targeted tests documented; residual failures are known/unrelated.
All child buckets nostrc-erw.1 through nostrc-erw.6 are closed; final verification build passed and known unrelated failures documented.

Fixed all four timeline card issues: blank cards on startup (hide row in setup), scroll jitter (immediate upper-growth compensation), muted avatars (removed opaque inline CSS background), and non-uniform margins (uniform 8px margin)
Added nostr_gtk_note_card_row_get_avatar_widgets() accessor and gnostr_avatar_download_async() calls in both the Tier 2 map handler and on_item_profile_changed callback in note-card-factory.c
Implemented GnostrTimelineSource/GnostrTimelineBatch and legacy GnNostrEventModel adapter; gnostr and event-model-windowing targets built. Focused runtime still hits existing storage teardown crash.
Implemented immutable snapshot row/snapshot/snapshot-model plus gnostr-test-timeline-snapshot; focused test passed.
Implemented NostrGtkNoteCardRow reserved-height, geometry token, and measured-geometry API; nostr_gtk and gnostr targets built. Existing macOS GTK realization issue noted for one window test.

Implemented GnostrTimelineFeedController core with source ingestion, hidden working set, pending-head semantics, snapshot publication, anchor math, geometry cache, signals, and focused feed-controller tests passing.

Implemented snapshot-row binding in gnostr-timeline-view-app-factory with reserved geometry/token before content, no mutable snapshot-row wiring, measured-geometry cleanup, and controller geometry forwarding when attached; gnostr target builds.

Main timeline switched to GnostrTimelineFeedController snapshot model; query/scroll/pending banner/pagination/restore-scroll routed through controller; controller attached to timeline view for geometry reporting; gnostr and focused timeline controller/snapshot tests passed.

Fixed compositor NIP-09 delete handling by projecting authorized delete targets into timeline batches and removing visible/pending rows with anchor preservation.

Fixed avatar download wiring, snapshot avatar binding, geometry measurement recomposition jitter, and unprofiled row leakage; verified clean build and focused timeline test.

Completed main-feed legacy mutation-boundary cleanup. Main timeline now attaches compositor snapshot model only; snapshot bind no longer starts row-driven metadata/embed/repost/quote async mutation paths; compositor-backed timeline skips legacy upper-growth scroll compensation; visibility/mute refreshes route through feed controller. Implemented complete timeline VM/hydrator with rich reply/quote/repost/action context, explicit reservation fields, snapshot preservation, and focused snapshot/hydrator/feed-controller tests passing.

Implemented geometry resolver with explicit VM reservation inputs, cache keys/layout signatures, fixed passive footprint semantics, explicit expansion support, note-card row API/tests, and focused geometry/feed-controller tests passing.

Implemented snapshot publication semantics: page-sized initial snapshots, pending-head admission, explicit banner reveal, older/newer visible-window expansion, geometry/viewport patch admission, anchor fallback tests; focused timeline tests pass.

Implemented rich snapshot row rendering from immutable VM data and fixed review blockers: snapshot rows bind precomputed markup/context/count/action state, reserved media/link areas are inert placeholders, no snapshot request-embed/DB/OG/media fetch from bind, focused timeline tests pass.
